title: Cinnamon Debris
description: Replaces the hard to see Ancient Debris texture with a much clearer, yummier cinnamon roll.
body:
Have you ever missed out on that sweet, delicious Ancient Debris? Found yourself wishing its burnt crust was a liiiittle more appetizing? Worry no longer! Get all of that yucky stuff out of your world with this texture pack! Our patented Cinnamon Roll Technique makes debris easy to spot even in low-light conditions, with some players even reporting being able to smell the fresh-baked* treats through solid rock. It's that easy!

*as of 4/22/25 or else you're fucked sorry
